queries.question: List lounges and observation decks with accessibility options for all people.
queries.sql:
SELECT Lounge.name
FROM Lounge
WHERE Lounge.Accessibility = "All"
UNION
SELECT ObservationDeck.name
FROM ObservationDeck
WHERE ObservationDeck.Accessibility = "All"
